name: ClawDexter
description: x402 payments + marketplace for OpenClaw agents. Search the OpenDexter marketplace, price-check endpoints, and auto-pay with USDC across Solana, Base, and 4 more chains.

svmPrivateKey.description: Solana wallet private key (base58) for x402 payments on Solana

evmPrivateKey.description: EVM wallet private key (hex, with or without 0x) for x402 payments on Base/Polygon/etc

defaultNetwork.description: Preferred network when endpoint supports multiple

maxPaymentUSDC.description: Maximum payment per request in USDC (e.g., '0.50' = $0.50)

directoryUrl.description: x402 directory API for discovering paid endpoints

svmPrivateKey.label: Solana Private Key
svmPrivateKey.help: Base58-encoded Solana private key for USDC payments

evmPrivateKey.label: EVM Private Key
evmPrivateKey.help: Hex private key for Base/Polygon/Arbitrum/Optimism/Avalanche payments

maxPaymentUSDC.label: Max Payment (USDC)
maxPaymentUSDC.help: Maximum amount to pay per API request
